name: event-gadget
description: 自动埋点 + 智能分析工具

scripts.build: npm run build:tracker && npm run build:dashboard && npm run build:server
scripts.dev: concurrently --names server,dashboard --prefix-colors cyan,magenta "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:dashboard"
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run build:tracker && cd packages/server && npm run setup
